title: Cobblemon: Snackbar SMP
description: The Cobblemon & Create modpack used on the Snackbar SMP, combining Pokémon-style gameplay with Create’s mechanical systems and automation.
body:
**Cobblemon: Snackbar SMP**

This modpack is made and used by **[RetroSpektakels](https://www.youtube.com/@RetroSpektakels)** and is featured alongside other creators, including **[Kokiburi](https://www.youtube.com/@kokiburi)** and **[Harold Bearman](https://www.twitch.tv/haroldbearman)**. Also including other members of the server, such as Its_Jepoan and GuardingFox.

The modpack is primarily built around the Cobblemon mod, integrating Pokémon-style gameplay into a modern modded Minecraft experience. It is supported by a range of additional mods focused on expanding gameplay and improving quality of life, including:

* Decoration
* World Building
* Structures and Dungeons
* Visual Enhancements
* Quality of Life Improvements
* Collectables
* Multiplayer Enhancements

Gameplay using this modpack can be found in the following playlists:

* [Cobblemon: Snackbar SMP Playlist 1](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLYawfpOvGVdheB_K3qK6GmeD7FjmAOZxV)
* [Cobblemon: Snackbar SMP Playlist 2](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLYawfpOvGVdgYLgtd3rngH8G4p3AUE_ro)

Cobblemon: Snackbar SMP is designed for a balanced survival experience, suitable for long-term singleplayer worlds and multiplayer servers, with an emphasis on exploration, building, automation, and Pokémon progression.
